core_features: 5/8/13 SMA ribbon alignment and pullbacks
entry_summary: Go long when fast SMA ribbon realigns higher after pullback; short when ribbon realigns lower.
exit_summary: Exit when ribbon flattens, 13-SMA is lost, or momentum fades.
why_or_limitations: Easy to test on 1-minute bars; tune lengths for stocks vs ETFs.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

core_features: 5,3,3 stochastics + 13-bar 3SD Bollinger Bands
entry_summary: Typically paired with ribbon/momentum entries; stoch confirms oversold/overbought reversals.
exit_summary: Take profit into Bollinger penetrations; exit if stoch rolls over against position.
why_or_limitations: Best used as an exit layer rather than a standalone entry strategy.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

applies_to: stocks, ETFs, options on liquid underlyings
core_features: RSI + MACD crossover / trend confirmation
entry_summary: Long on bullish MACD crossover with RSI > 50 or RSI leaving oversold; reverse for shorts.
exit_summary: Exit when MACD crosses back or RSI leaves overbought/oversold regime.
why_or_limitations: One of the simplest high-throughput strategies to grid-search.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

core_features: Daily pivot levels and intraday pivot highs/lows
entry_summary: Buy around pivot support after reversal signal; short near pivot resistance.
exit_summary: Exit into next pivot/resistance/support or on failed reversal.
why_or_limitations: Works well on highly liquid names with repeated intraday reactions.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

core_features: Relative Momentum Index + SuperTrend
entry_summary: Long when RMI leaves oversold and price is above SuperTrend; inverse for shorts.
exit_summary: Exit on RMI reversal or price crossing SuperTrend.
why_or_limitations: Good if you want a more adaptive trend filter than plain moving averages.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

core_features: Linear regression slope + Bollinger Bands
entry_summary: Buy near lower band in supportive trend/channel; short near upper band when bearish slope aligns.
exit_summary: Exit at channel midpoint/opposite band or on breakout failure.
why_or_limitations: Can overfit if channel lookback is not constrained.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

applies_to: stocks, ETFs, options on liquid underlyings
core_features: Fast/slow EMA crossover + RSI oversold/overbought filter
entry_summary: Long when price > fast EMA > slow EMA and RSI lifts from oversold; reverse for shorts.
exit_summary: Exit on negative crossover, RSI deterioration, or fixed scalp target.
why_or_limitations: Excellent baseline strategy for parameter sweeps.
source_title: Investopedia - Top Trading Strategies for Scalping

core_features: Break above resistance / below support with volume confirmation
entry_summary: Enter in breakout direction once price closes beyond key level and volume confirms.
exit_summary: Take quick profit after extension; exit fast on breakout failure/re-entry into range.
why_or_limitations: Probably the cleanest use of 1-minute bars for liquid stocks or SPY/QQQ options.
source_title: Investopedia - Scalping Strategies: Mastering Quick Profits in the Market

core_features: Bollinger Bands / RSI overextension fade
entry_summary: Fade extreme moves when price is stretched and momentum begins to revert.
exit_summary: Exit toward VWAP / moving average / band midpoint.
why_or_limitations: Best on range-bound periods; gets hurt on strong trend days.
source_title: Investopedia - Scalping Strategies: Mastering Quick Profits in the Market

core_features: Bid/ask spread capture on both sides of order book
entry_summary: Post buy and sell liquidity around spread to collect edge.
exit_summary: Inventory/risk controls, immediate hedge or flatten rules.
why_or_limitations: Not realistic with 1-minute bars alone; this is more microstructure/HFT-like.
source_title: Investopedia - Scalping Strategies: Mastering Quick Profits in the Market

core_features: Order book imbalance and large resting liquidity
entry_summary: Trade in direction of visible order-flow imbalance around key levels.
exit_summary: Exit on imbalance fade or target hit.
why_or_limitations: Not testable from bars alone.
source_title: Investopedia - Scalping Strategies: Mastering Quick Profits in the Market

core_features: Reaction to earnings, macro releases, headlines
entry_summary: Enter immediately after news-triggered surge if direction/volume confirm.
exit_summary: Exit quickly as volatility normalizes.
why_or_limitations: Possible only if you bring in timestamped news/calendar data.
source_title: Investopedia - Scalping Strategies: Mastering Quick Profits in the Market

applies_to: stocks, ETFs, options via underlying direction
core_features: Intraday VWAP as dynamic support/resistance
entry_summary: Go long on VWAP reclaim/bounce with volume; short on rejection below VWAP.
exit_summary: Exit at next impulse leg, prior high/low, or if price loses VWAP again.
why_or_limitations: Very practical for liquid large caps and index ETFs.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

applies_to: stocks, ETFs, options via underlying direction
core_features: Short ATR-based SuperTrend settings
entry_summary: Trade in direction of SuperTrend flips with lower-timeframe price confirmation.
exit_summary: Exit on SuperTrend reversal or loss of momentum.
why_or_limitations: Good for avoiding some chop, but sensitive to ATR multiplier choice.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

core_features: Range/triangle/channel break with higher-timeframe confirmation
entry_summary: Use 5–15 minute structure, then trigger on 1-minute breakout close.
exit_summary: Tight stop near breakout level; modest fixed target or trail.
why_or_limitations: Nice bridge between raw price action and fully indicator-driven systems.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

core_features: RSI length 5 or 7 with extreme thresholds such as 20/80
entry_summary: Use extreme fast-RSI readings or divergence to time quick option entries.
exit_summary: Exit on momentum fade, fixed target, or time stop.
data_needed: Option bars or underlying bars mapped to option entries
why_or_limitations: Works better on highly liquid near-ATM contracts.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

core_features: Selling near-expiry premium in calm/range-bound periods
entry_summary: Sell near-expiry premium when market is stable and expected to remain contained.
exit_summary: Buy back after small premium decay or if underlying starts to trend.
why_or_limitations: Bars help, but realistic testing benefits from quote spreads and Greek awareness.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

core_features: Trade near-ITM or ATM options in direction of EMA/VWAP trend
entry_summary: Only take option trades when short-term trend and liquidity align.
exit_summary: Small predefined target, hard stop, and early exit when momentum pauses.
why_or_limitations: One of the most realistic option-scalp templates with your Alpaca setup.
source_title: StockGro - Options Scalping Strategy – Best Profitable Setup Guide

core_features: Breakout of 9:30–9:45 ET opening range with volume confirmation
entry_summary: Buy calls above opening-range high or puts below opening-range low.
exit_summary: Exit on 20–40% option gain, stop at 15–20%, or if price re-enters range.
why_or_limitations: Excellent candidate for your dataset and easy to automate.
source_title: QuantVPS - Top 5 SPY Options Scalping Strategies for Day Traders

core_features: 20 EMA pullback + RSI confirmation
entry_summary: Enter on pullback to 20 EMA in strong trend when RSI resets then turns back.
exit_summary: Take 15–25% option gain or exit if trend breaks / time stop hits.
why_or_limitations: Another very clean baseline for SPY/QQQ options.
source_title: QuantVPS - Top 5 SPY Options Scalping Strategies for Day Traders

core_features: Sudden IV / volume / price expansion around news
entry_summary: Enter near-term ATM options when price, volume, and volatility all spike together.
exit_summary: Exit as volatility normalizes or on predefined premium gain.
data_needed: Option bars plus ideally quotes/IV/news timestamps
why_or_limitations: Works best if you add event calendar/news tags and maybe quote data.
source_title: QuantVPS - Top 5 SPY Options Scalping Strategies for Day Traders

core_features: NYSE TICK extremes and divergence vs price
entry_summary: Use TICK surges or divergences to confirm momentum/reversal trades.
exit_summary: Exit on TICK normalization or divergence failure.
why_or_limitations: Needs an external TICK data feed; not covered by 1-minute bars alone.
source_title: QuantVPS - Top 5 SPY Options Scalping Strategies for Day Traders

core_features: Sell short-dated premium in flat/range-bound periods
entry_summary: Sell 0DTE premium when SPY is consolidating and expected move is contained.
exit_summary: Cover after partial theta capture or if underlying breaks out.
why_or_limitations: Feasible, but realistic slippage and assignment/gamma risk matter a lot.
source_title: QuantVPS - Top 5 SPY Options Scalping Strategies for Day Traders

applies_to: index ETFs, large-cap stocks, futures-style adaptation
core_features: Wait for 09:50–10:10 ET window, define bias, enter retracement toward bias
entry_summary: After 10:10 ET bias forms, enter retracement toward target in bias direction.
exit_summary: Use hard stop, then trail after trade goes green.
why_or_limitations: Reddit/community strategy; rules are clear enough to prototype but less formally specified.
source_title: Reddit - So, I found my strategy with a high probability success rate

core_features: Focus on volatility, spreads, and gamma bursts in fast markets
entry_summary: Use as a filter to enable or disable scalps only during rapid volatility expansion regimes.
exit_summary: Exit when volatility/spreads normalize or move stalls.
why_or_limitations: Useful as a research idea, but under-specified and hard to test from bars alone.
source_title: Dhan - Option scalping strategies in fast markets
